response.justification: Candidate is significantly overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience including Staff and Senior positions. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS background aligns well with the tech stack, and AI/MCP work matches the LLM nice-to-have. However, the seniority mismatch raises concerns about role fit, compensation expectations, and retention. Berlin location and basic German support the on-site requirement.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms
Relevant AWS (CDK), Kubernetes, and AI/LLM integration exposure matching nice-to-haves
Berlin-based, supporting the high on-site presence requirement
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior background for an entry-level IC role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed; database experience is primarily MongoDB and MySQL
Likely compensation and growth-path mismatch may lead to short tenure
